infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: WomenSafe needs your location to send it to emergency contacts during SOS.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: WomenSafe needs your location to send it to emergency contacts during SOS, even in the background.

infoPlist.NSLocationUsageDescription: WomenSafe needs your location to send it to emergency contacts during SOS.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: WomenSafe uses motion sensors to detect a shake gesture for SOS.
